item.code_text: Assistance with application for food pantry program (procedure)
Assistance with application for food pantry program
item.description: Assistance with application for food pantry program

item.code_text: Referral to local housing assistance resources
item.description: Referral to local housing assistance resources

item.code_text: Provide IPV resources and safety planning; social work referral
item.description: Provide IPV resources and safety planning; social work referral

item.code_text: [{"resourceType":"ServiceRequest","status":"active","intent":"order","priority":"routine","category":[{"coding":[{"system":"http:\/\/hl7.org\/fhir\/us\/sdoh-clinicalcare\/CodeSystem\/SDOHCC-CodeSystemTemporaryCodes","code":"food-insecurity","display":"Food Insecurity"}],"text":"Food Insecurity"}],"code":{"text":"Assistance with application for food pantry program"},"reasonCode":[{"text":"Food insecurity risk"}],"subject":{"reference":"Patient\/2"},"authoredOn":"2025-09-25"},{"resourceType":"ServiceRequest","status":"active","intent":"order","priority":"routine","category":[{"coding":[{"system":"http:\/\/hl7.org\/fhir\/us\/sdoh-clinicalcare\/CodeSystem\/SDOHCC-CodeSystemTemporaryCodes","code":"housing-instability","display":"Housing Instability"}],"text":"Housing Instability"}],"code":{"text":"Referral to local housing assistance resources"},"reasonCode":[{"text":"Housing instability risk"}],"subject":{"reference":"Patient\/2"},"authoredOn":"2025-09-25"},{"resourceType":"ServiceRequest","status":"active","intent":"order","priority":"routine","category":[{"coding":[{"system":"http:\/\/hl7.org\/fhir\/us\/sdoh-clinicalcare\/CodeSystem\/SDOHCC-CodeSystemTemporaryCodes","code":"intimate-partner-violence","display":"Intimate Partner Violence"}],"text":"Intimate Partner Violence"}],"code":{"text":"Provide IPV resources and safety planning; social work referral"},"reasonCode":[{"text":"IPV risk present"}],"subject":{"reference":"Patient\/2"},"authoredOn":"2025-09-25"}]
item.description: [{"resourceType":"ServiceRequest","status":"active","intent":"order","priority":"routine","category":[{"coding":[{"system":"http:\/\/hl7.org\/fhir\/us\/sdoh-clinicalcare\/CodeSystem\/SDOHCC-CodeSystemTemporaryCodes","code":"food-insecurity","display":"Food Insecurity"}],"text":"Food Insecurity"}],"code":{"text":"Assistance with application for food pantry program"},"reasonCode":[{"text":"Food insecurity risk"}],"subject":{"reference":"Patient\/2"},"authoredOn":"2025-09-25"},{"resourceType":"ServiceRequest","status":"active","intent":"order","priority":"routine","category":[{"coding":[{"system":"http:\/\/hl7.org\/fhir\/us\/sdoh-clinicalcare\/CodeSystem\/SDOHCC-CodeSystemTemporaryCodes","code":"housing-instability","display":"Housing Instability"}],"text":"Housing Instability"}],"code":{"text":"Referral to local housing assistance resources"},"reasonCode":[{"text":"Housing instability risk"}],"subject":{"reference":"Patient\/2"},"authoredOn":"2025-09-25"},{"resourceType":"ServiceRequest","status":"active","intent":"order","priority":"routine","category":[{"coding":[{"system":"http:\/\/hl7.org\/fhir\/us\/sdoh-clinicalcare\/CodeSystem\/SDOHCC-CodeSystemTemporaryCodes","code":"intimate-partner-violence","display":"Intimate Partner Violence"}],"text":"Intimate Partner Violence"}],"code":{"text":"Provide IPV resources and safety planning; social work referral"},"reasonCode":[{"text":"IPV risk present"}],"subject":{"reference":"Patient\/2"},"authoredOn":"2025-09-25"}]

item.code_text: Are you worried about losing your housing [PRAPARE]

question1.display: Within past 12 months we worried whether our food would run out before we got money to buy more

question2.display: Within past 12 months the food we bought just didn't last and we didn't have money to get more

history_physical.description: Dr Albert Davis examined Mr Jeremy Bates and found him to be healthy but advised him to cut down on smoking

evaluation_note.description: The patient was found to be healthy and advised to follow his current routine of exercise, work, sleep and quality of life
